DNS TTL conversion.
BadTTLz!DNS TTL value is not well-formed.N)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
+/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/dns/ttl.pyr
Convert the text form of a TTL to an integer.
    The BIND 8 units syntax for TTLs (e.g. '1w6d4h3m10s') is supported.
    *text*, a ``str``, the textual TTL.
    Raises ``dns.ttl.BadTTL`` if the TTL is not well-formed.
    Returns an ``int``.
    r
unknown unit '%s'z
trailing integerz1TTL should be between 0 and 2**32 - 1 (inclusive))
isdigit
lenr
lower
MAX_TTL)
text
totalZ
currentZ
need_digit
	from_text"
cannot convert value to TTL)
isinstancer
dnsZ

ValueError)
valuer
makeT
